name: Canvas Beach Chair Cream - Threshold™
description:
The Canvas Beach Chair from Threshold™ adds the perfect blend of style and functionality to your outdoor space. Supported on a weather- and rust-resistant metal frame to withstand the outdoor elements, this beach chair features a canvas fabric seat and slatted back, along with wooden arms that offer comfortable seating experience. Plus, the beach chair folds compact for travel, complete with backpack straps for effortless carrying,

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
